title: Magic Mirrors
description: Teleport to your spawn point instantly with a magic mirror!
body:
# This mod will no longer be updated in favor of [Addity](https://modrinth.com/mod/addity) # Magic Mirrors [FABRIC]

## About ### This project is a rewrite of the Forge mod 'Magic Mirrors' It allows a player to teleport to its spawn point using a magic mirror, however, for dimensional travel,an upgrade to the mirror is required. To upgrade the mirror, you will require a Dimensional Crystal, which can be crafted using a netherite ingot and soul soil. ## Images

### Crafting recipes: #### Dimensional mirror

#### Magic Mirror

#### Dimension Crystal
